category_sources: Official GitHub README says libarchive develops a portable C library for reading and writing streaming archives.
source_facts.description says multi-format archive and compression library.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository is named libarchive/libarchive.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README says libarchive.org is the home for ongoing development, documentation, and mailing lists.
Official GitHub wiki provides project documentation pages.
repo_sources: Official GitHub README points to libarchive.org and the GitHub issue and pull request workflow.
Official GitHub repository libarchive/libarchive describes itself as the multi-format archive and compression library.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README lists libarchive, tar, cpio, and zcat components and archive-format topics.
source_facts.executables includes bsdtar, bsdcpio, bsdcat, and bsdunzip.
